code_prompt_defaults.object_description_clean_grid: a turning-agent automaton grid with an arrow marker showing the starting cell and direction
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_lab_panel: a lab-style turning-agent automaton grid with an arrow marker showing the starting cell and direction
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_notebook_grid: a notebook-style turning-agent automaton grid with an arrow marker showing the starting cell and direction
code_prompt_defaults.rule_instruction_binary_rule: Binary rule: before moving, a light cell turns the agent right and changes to colored; a colored cell turns the agent left and changes to light; then the agent moves one cell forward, wrapping around the grid edge.
code_prompt_defaults.rule_instruction_three_state_rule: Three-state rule: before moving, state 0 turns the agent right and advances to 1; state 1 keeps the direction and advances to 2; state 2 turns the agent left and advances to 0; then the agent moves one cell forward, wrapping around the grid edge.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text: Which option shows the agent's final cell and direction?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object/dictionary with keys "start_marker" and "selected_option"; each key maps to a pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_agent_future_grid_label: Which option shows the full grid after the updates?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_agent_future_grid_label: set "annotation" to an object/dictionary with keys "source_grid" and "selected_option"; each key maps to a pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_agent_future_grid_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
